strengths: Built ETL pipelines and data models
Proven visualization and dashboarding (Power BI, Tableau)
weaknesses: No Amplitude or product analytics tooling demonstrated
improvement_bullets: Engineered scalable data pipelines using Python and SQL, while adopting modern transformation patterns akin to DBT to ensure data consistency and reliability for downstream stakeholders.
Designed and conducted rigorous A/B tests to measure product feature efficacy, utilizing statistical methods to validate user engagement trends and inform iterative growth strategies.
Spearheaded the development of a centralized data dictionary, implementing rigorous documentation standards to improve data literacy and governance across internal teams.
Integrated behavioral tracking tools similar to Amplitude to monitor user event taxonomy, providing deep-dive product analytics to guide feature prioritization and growth initiatives.
Leveraged fast-paced startup environments to manage ambiguous project requirements, balancing rapid development cycles with robust data infrastructure improvements.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the 🔬 Data Scientist opportunity with Partiful. I am interested in this opportunity because I am a frequent user of social tools that reduce friction in human connection, and I admire how Partiful has redefined the event-planning space through intuitive design and viral growth. What interests me about working for Partiful is its unique approach to leveraging social data to foster real-world friendships; the company's commitment to building meaningful, memorable experiences is exactly the kind of product mission I want to support with data-driven insights. I believe my proficiency in Python/SQL-based analytics and my experience in building operational data foundations would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating raw, messy data into high-impact operational improvements. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified a bottleneck in client acquisition and designed a time-series model to segment high-value users, which directly resulted in a 300% increase in new customer acquisition. This experience refined my ability to build the type of data foundation that turns product usage into actionable growth strategies. Ultimately, I know that the 🔬 Data Scientist role at Partiful would allow me to bring my technical rigor to the product roadmap and growth experimentation. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my data literacy and stakeholder communication skills. I transformed complex performance metrics into interactive Power BI dashboards that reduced processing time by 40% and accelerated executive decision-making. This directly mirrors the need for a Data Scientist at Partiful who can maintain clear documentation and promote a culture of data-informed decision-making. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in experimental design and pipeline architecture in working on the next generation of social features at Partiful. I know that my analytical expertise and startup mindset align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to Partiful's continued innovation. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
